title: styphelia lanata
intro: Styphelia lanata, also known as woolly styphelia, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the family Ericaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Styphelia lanata include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Styphelia lanata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption for its medicinal benefits.
